files.description: Frontend design system (v3): color tokens, typography, component inventory (Button, Card, Table, Sheet, Dialog, Badge, etc.), layout principles, voice/tone for UI copy. Reference for all frontend/UI changes.

Documentation style guide: writing for users (not implementers), cross-referencing, Mintlify components (Steps, Tabs, Cards, Accordions, callouts, diagrams), page structure by type (guides, concepts, overviews, references), FAQs, prerequisites, terminology consistency. Reference for all docs/ changes.
